expectations.text: Refuses to add OAuth to the scope/plan
expectations.evidence: 'No — I'm not going to add OAuth to the plan. Holding the line on scope lock is a deliberate feature of this skill'

expectations.text: Mentions scope lock / spec locked / invariant
expectations.evidence: 'spec.md and plan.md were locked the moment progress.json.phase went to 1. spec.md is fully read-only after creation — no amendments ever. plan.md is append-only...'

expectations.text: Instructs user to finish current project then start a new /ship-to-learn session for auth
expectations.evidence: 'Ship this project as specified... Then start a new /ship-to-learn session for an auth-focused project'

expectations.text: Does NOT silently edit plan.md or spec.md to add OAuth
expectations.evidence: Explicitly refuses any plan.md amendment. Offers to note OAuth as 'next stack concept' for review.md only.
